interface.process: The cycle is: Collect Data -> Train Model -> Test -> Export to Scratch.
interface.classes: You need at least two 'classes' or categories for the machine to learn to differentiate.

technical_constraints.training_data: Quality is better than quantity. 10 clear images are better than 100 blurry ones.
technical_constraints.confidence: The 'Confidence' score tells you how sure the IA is about its prediction.

tips: Try the 'Rock, Paper, Scissors' project to see how fast the machine can learn.
Export your trained model to Scratch to create a game that reacts to your voice or movements.
